chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 321 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ سَرَّحَ لِحْيَتَهُ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً وَ عَدَّهَا مَرَّةً مَرَّةً لَمْ يَقْرَبْهُ اَلشَّيْطَانُ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْماً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.321 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever combs their beard seventy times and counts it one by one will not be approached by Shaytan (Satan) for forty days."
